summary: Iteration 67 - Testing 3 NEW Features: (1) Reset to Default button in Page Builder, (2) Pre-built feature template library with 10 templates, (3) Account level gating on new features. All 17 backend tests passed (100%). All 11 frontend tests passed (100%).
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/subscriptions/plans returns all 3 plans (free, rise, pro)
Backend: Free plan locks spotify_data, beat_marketplace, messaging, royalty_splits
Backend: Rise plan locks ai_strategy, content_id, spotify_canvas, spotify_data, royalty_splits
Backend: Rise plan unlocks beat_marketplace and messaging
Backend: Pro plan has no locked features (empty locked array)
Backend: Free plan features list is correct
Backend: Rise plan features include messaging and beat marketplace
Backend: Pro plan features include Spotify Data and Royalty Splits
Backend: POST /api/admin/pages/landing/seed-defaults resets to 14 blocks
Backend: POST /api/admin/pages/about/seed-defaults resets to 5 blocks
Backend: POST /api/admin/pages/pricing/seed-defaults resets to 4 blocks
Backend: Reset endpoint requires admin authentication (401 without auth)
Backend: Reset invalid page returns 400
Backend: Reset content verified - Landing page has G.O.A.T hero
Backend: POST /api/admin/pages/{slug}/add-block adds new block
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/pages/{slug}/blocks/{block_id} deletes block
Backend: GET /api/admin/pages/block-templates/all returns 12 templates
Frontend: Page Builder loads at /admin/page-builder/landing
Frontend: BLOCKS and TEMPLATES tabs present in sidebar
Frontend: BLOCKS tab shows 12 basic block types (Hero Banner, Text Block, Image, Feature Grid, Call to Action, Testimonials, Stats Row, Spacer, Two Columns, Pricing, Logo Bar, Video Embed)

Frontend: TEMPLATES tab shows 10 feature templates (Beat Marketplace, Spotify Integration, AI Features, Collaboration Hub, Royalty Splits, Artist Profile, Leaderboard, Distribution CTA, Subscription Plans, Content Protection)
Frontend: Clicking a template adds a block to the canvas (14 -> 15 blocks)
Frontend: Reset button in toolbar shows confirmation dialog
Frontend: Reset confirmation message: 'Reset this page to the original default layout? This will replace all current blocks.'
Frontend: Reset button resets page to default 14 blocks
Frontend: Page switcher navigates to About page (5 blocks)
Frontend: Page switcher navigates to Pricing page (4 blocks)
Frontend: Save Draft, Publish, Preview buttons present in toolbar
critical_code_review_comments: SUBSCRIPTION_PLANS correctly updated with new locked features for each tier
Free plan locks: spotify_data, beat_marketplace, messaging, royalty_splits (all 4 new features)
Rise plan locks: spotify_data, royalty_splits but unlocks beat_marketplace, messaging
Pro plan has empty locked array (all features available)
TEMPLATE_BLOCKS array in PageBuilderPage.jsx contains all 10 feature templates with correct icons and descriptions
resetToDefault() function correctly calls seed-defaults endpoint and shows confirmation dialog
sidebarTab state properly toggles between 'blocks' and 'templates' tabs
seed_data_creation: None - used existing admin accounts and page builder seeding endpoints
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 67 tested 3 NEW features: (1) Reset to Default button - works correctly with confirmation dialog, resets pages to original content (Landing: 14 blocks, About: 5 blocks, Pricing: 4 blocks). (2) Template library - 10 feature templates in TEMPLATES tab (Beat Marketplace, Spotify Integration, AI Features, Collaboration Hub, Royalty Splits, Artist Profile, Leaderboard, Distribution CTA, Subscription Plans, Content Protection). Clicking a template adds a pre-configured block to the canvas. (3) Subscription tier gating - Free plan locks spotify_data, beat_marketplace, messaging, royalty_splits. Rise plan locks spotify_data, royalty_splits but unlocks beat_marketplace, messaging. Pro plan has no locked features.

reset_to_default.confirmation_dialog: Yes - 'Reset this page to the original default layout? This will replace all current blocks.'

templates: Beat Marketplace - Showcase your beat catalog
